title: Botanica Noir Luxurious Herbal Hair Oil Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Botanica Noir Luxurious Herbal Hair Oil Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Reusable product advertisement built around luxurious herbal hair oil in a dark amber glass bottle with a gold dropper cap and embossed gold typography. Subject: BOTANICA NOIR appears as the visible brand identity on the label, poster, booth, or board. luxurious herbal hair oil in a dark amber glass bottle with a gold dropper cap and embossed gold typography is the swappable hero content; keep it clear, concrete, and visually dominant while retaining the template look. Scene: luxurious herbal hair oil in a dark amber glass bottle with a gold dropper cap and embossed gold typography provides the swappable context while the fixed atmosphere and prop logic remain stable. Composition: Retain the fixed composition, hierarchy, crop, viewpoint, spacing rhythm, and readable focal structure. Signature Elements: golden oil droplets pouring from the dropper, botanical particles, coconut, amla, almonds, hibiscus, and polished black marble reflections appears as the product-specific hero visual feature. HERBAL GLOW appears only where visible text belongs; keep it short, readable, and integrated into the layout. Style: Ultra-premium cinematic product shot of a luxurious herbal hair oil in a dark amber glass bottle with a gold dropper cap and embossed gold typography. Golden oil droplets pour elegantly from the dropper, captured freeze-frame mid-air. Surrounding the bottle: fresh coconut halves, amla berries, almonds, hibiscus flowers, and green herbal leaves float in motion, with tiny golden oil droplets sparkling in light and a soft mist of botanical particles. The bottle sits centered on Color Palette: Retain the fixed color relationships, contrast, texture, and finish as part of the template identity. Lighting: Use template-consistent lighting behavior with believable highlights, shadows, and depth. Restrictions: Use concrete image-generating details, fully resolved variable values, platform-neutral language, source-accurate brand text when the prompt calls for branding, identity-safe subjects, and clean readable text.
